Lyrics.text:
Mamiko loatra ny eo akaikinao, Ray.
Lavitra sento, tsy misy manjo,
Eo 'zany 'zahohitoetra mandrakizay,
Anilanao, Ray, 'zaho sambatra.

Akaikinao, mangidy tonga mamy;
Eo 'zany foko ampoky ny soa.
Ny fahoriana, loza izay ho tamy,
Anilanao dia tonga zava-tsoa.

Akaikinao no misy famonjena;
He! Very toky raha hilaozanao
Lavitra Anao milofika ny tena.
Tariho, Ray, eo akaikinao.

Eny, ry Ray, anilanao no tiako
Tantano aho, Ray, ho ao an-danitrao.
Ny sandrinao mitantana ny diako
Mandra-pahatonga ho eo akaikinao.
